commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=0cc382bbfc936030fd6933ec6e30771b703543e0)
commands.review_summary:
The PR removes the “(Telegram only)” qualifier from the `/reasoning stream` acknowledgement, updates the thinking docs to channel-support-gated wording, and adds mixed-inline directive coverage.

PR surface: Source 0, Tests +47, Docs 0. Total +47 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main formats `/reasoning stream` as `Reasoning stream enabled (Telegram only).`, while current Feishu/Discord/Slack paths have reasoning preview callbacks. I did not run a live channel repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor real behavior proof is still required before merge, and the sibling docs mismatch needs review or a small follow-up edit; automation should not substitute for the contributor's channel proof.

target.title: fix: remove telegram-only reasoning stream copy
target.body:
Summary
- Cherry-pick the internal fix that removes the stale Telegram-only qualifier from the `/reasoning stream` acknowledgement.
- Update `docs/tools/thinking.md` so reasoning stream support is described as channel-support gated instead of Telegram-only.
- Keep focused mixed-inline directive coverage for the channel-neutral acknowledgement.

Provenance
- Internal source commit: `30e65f2140` (`fix: remove outdated "(Telegram only)" from reasoning stream ack`, author Lanzhi).
- Follow-up on this PR branch: `0cc382bbfc` updates the docs wording for current upstream.
- Replaces stale #72709.

Verification
- `pnpm docs:list`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/directive-handling.mixed-inline.test.ts`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base upstream/main`

Behavior addressed: `/reasoning stream` no longer tells users the stream is Telegram-only when other supported channels can stream reasoning.
Real environment tested: local upstream/main-based worktree under `.claude/worktrees/fix-reasoning-stream-ack`.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `pnpm docs:list`; `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/directive-handling.mixed-inline.test.ts`; `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base upstream/main`.
Evidence after fix: the directive test asserts `Reasoning stream enabled.` on a non-Telegram channel surface; autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.
Observed result after fix: Vitest passed with 1 test file and 5 tests; autoreview clean.
What was not tested: no live Telegram, Feishu, or Lark channel run was performed.
target.author: lanzhi-lee

commands.reason: repair commands require an open issue or PR
